---
title: "pencil_imun"
author: "Kadek Adit Wiryadana"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Rasio Eosinofil per Limfosit dan Rasio Basofil per Limfosit pada reaksi anafilaksis

## Library

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(googlesheets4)
library(skimr)
library(gtsummary)
library(skimr)
```

## Import Data

```{r}
data_awal <- googlesheets4::read_sheet("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/11i1_hS6h00tasrYxlCTuPvGgTHqWb9de-eD8HLjLcQI/edit?gid=11410341#gid=11410341", sheet = 1)
```

### Seleksi Data

```{r}
data_clean <- data_awal %>%
  filter(inc_exc == "Include") %>%
  mutate(across(19:26, as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate(Gender = as.factor(Gender)) %>%
  mutate(MR = as.character(MR)) %>%
  mutate(Onset_jam = as.numeric(Onset_jam)) %>%
  mutate(Usia = as.numeric(Usia))
  

glimpse(data_clean)
```

### Descritive Statistics

```{r}
skim(data_clean)

## TBL Summary without No, Nama, MR, skin and IgE
data_clean[, -c(1,2,3,6,7)] %>% tbl_summary
```
